arts.ttl: Manchester United XI vs Athletic Club – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Manchester United head to the San Mames Stadium tonight to take on Athletic Bilbao in the Europa League semi-finals. With the tournament’s final set to be hosted at the same venue, the Red Devils will hope this is not their last trip to the Basque Country this season. arts.ttl: Athletic Club vs Manchester United – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Manchester United face Athletic Bilbao in the Europa League semi-finals tonight. The Red Devils’ dramatic comeback in the quarter-final against Lyon will live long in the memory of every United fan. Bruno Fernandes, Kobbie Mainoo and Harry Maguire all netted in a seven-minute period of extra time to overturn a seemingly unassailable lead.
